name: get_invoice_status
description: Look up outstanding invoices for a customer. Call this when a customer asks about a bill, wants to know what they owe, or calls to pay for completed work. Summarise verbally — do not read out every line item. Say something like: 'Your invoice is for $340 for the logbook service on the 14th — still outstanding.' Then offer to send a payment link.

caller_phone.description: The caller's phone number to look up invoices by customer record

rego_plate.description: Vehicle registration plate if the customer mentions it and caller_phone lookup returns no results

customer_name.description: Customer name as a fallback if phone lookup returns no match
